---
title: Laura Avellaneda
image: ../people-images/laura-avellaneda.jpeg
started: 2017
subtitle: "MSc. Student"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: ../people-images/laura-avellaneda.jpeg
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      href: https://twitter.com
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com
---

Curabitur gravida eu erat et fring. Morbi congue augue vel eros ullamcorper, eget convallis tortor sagittis. Fusce sodales viverra mauris a fringilla. Donec feugiat, justo eu blandit placerat, enim dui volutpat turpis, eu dictum lectus urna eu urna. Mauris sed massa ornare, interdum ipsum a, semper massa.
